outputs.name: message
outputs.description: A message that indicates whether the cached secrets for the provided alias are removed or not.

inputs.name: package
inputs.description: Optional. A user-defined package that contains the vault connection alias. Specify a package to use a package-level vault connection alias. Leave this field empty to use a server-level vault connection alias.

inputs.name: alias
inputs.description: The name of the vault connection alias that determines the vault server to use for decrypting the provided ciphertext.

inputs.name: cipherText
inputs.description: The ciphertext that you want to decrypt by using the vault server.

inputs.name: package
inputs.description: Optional. A user-defined package that contains the vault connection alias. Specify a package to use a package-level vault connection alias. Leave this field empty to use a server-level vault connection alias.

inputs.name: alias
inputs.description: The name of the vault connection alias that determines the vault server to use for encrypting the provided text.

inputs.name: plainText
inputs.description: The plaintext that you want to encrypt by using the vault server.

outputs.name: cipherText
outputs.description: The plaintext in the encrypted format. For example, see the sample cipherText .

inputs.name: package
inputs.description: Optional. A user-defined package that contains the vault connection alias. Specify a package to use a package-level vault connection alias. Leave this field empty to use a server-level vault connection alias.

inputs.name: alias
inputs.description: The name of the vault connection alias that identifies the vault server containing the secret subkey to retrieve.

inputs.name: secretKey
inputs.description: The secret subkey that you want to get from a secret in the vault.

outputs.name: secretValue
outputs.description: The value of the subkey retrieved from the vault.

outputs.name: cacheHit
outputs.description: Conditional. Indicates whether the subkey was found in the secrets cache or not. The service returns one of the following values: true , if secretKey is retrieved from the secrets cache. false , if secretKey is not retrieved from the secrets cache because the secretKey is not available in the cache or it is retrieved for the first time. This parameter is returned only when the secrets cache for the vault connection alias is enabled.

inputs.name: package
inputs.description: Optional. A user-defined package that contains the vault connection alias. Specify a package to use a package-level vault connection alias. Leave this field empty to use a server-level vault connection alias.

inputs.name: alias
inputs.description: The name of the vault connection alias that identifies the vault server from which secrets are retrieved to refresh the secrets cache. If you specify a package-level vault connection alias, the service refreshes the secrets cache only for the package. Otherwise, the service refreshes the entire secrets cache.

outputs.name: message
outputs.description: A message that indicates whether the cached secrets for the provided alias are refreshed or not.

inputs.name: package
inputs.description: Optional. A user-defined package that contains the vault connection alias. Specify a package to use a package-level vault connection alias. Leave this field empty to use a server-level vault connection alias.

inputs.name: alias
inputs.description: The vault connection alias that identifies the vault server to remove secrets.

outputs.name: message
outputs.description: A message that indicates whether the secret is removed or not.

inputs.name: package
inputs.description: Optional. A user-defined package that contains the vault connection alias. Specify a package to use a package-level vault connection alias. Leave this field empty to use a server-level vault connection alias.

inputs.name: alias
inputs.description: The vault connection alias that identifies the vault server containing the secret subkey to remove.

inputs.name: secretKey
inputs.description: The secret subkey to remove from a secret in the vault.

outputs.name: message
outputs.description: A message that indicates whether the secret subkey is removed or not.

inputs.name: package
inputs.description: Optional. A user-defined package that contains the vault connection alias. Specify a package to use a package-level vault connection alias. Leave this field empty to use a server-level vault connection alias.

inputs.name: alias
inputs.description: The vault connection alias that identifies the vault server to insert or update a secret subkey.

inputs.name: secretKey
inputs.description: Name of the secret subkey.

inputs.name: secretValue
inputs.description: Value of the secret subkey.

outputs.name: message
outputs.description: A message that indicates whether the secret subkey is set or not.

inputs.name: package
inputs.description: Optional. A user-defined package that contains the vault connection alias. Specify a package to use a package-level vault connection alias. Leave this field empty to use a server-level vault connection alias.

inputs.name: alias
inputs.description: The vault connection alias that identifies the vault server to insert or update a secret.

inputs.name: secrets
inputs.description: The secret that must be inserted or updated.

inputs.name: key
inputs.description: Name of a secret subkey.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: Value of the secret subkey.

outputs.name: message
outputs.description: A message that indicates whether insertion or update of secrets is successful or not.
